task:
Create GitHub issue on shivam2014/pi-files with label "ready-for-agent".

Run this exact command:

```
gh issue create \
  --repo shivam2014/pi-files \
  --label "ready-for-agent" \
  --title "Slice A: Fusion foundation modules (utils, config, judge, format, models)" \
  --body '## Parent

https://github.com/shivam2014/pi-files/issues/81

## What to build

Extract 5 foundation modules from fusion-tool.ts, each getting its own file and test suite:

- **fusion-utils.ts** — mapWithConcurrencyLimit, extractText (shared helpers)
- **fusion-config.ts** — loadFusionConfig, saveFusionConfig, sanitizeFusionConfig, getDefaultReasoningEffort
- **fusion-judge.ts** — parseJudgeAnalysis, extractJsonObject, type guards (isStringArray, isContradictions, isUniqueInsights)
- **fusion-format.ts** — formatFusionResult, formatPanelResults
- **fusion-models.ts** — resolveModels, resolveOneModel, autoDiversePanel

Each module is extracted as pure functions with no side effects. The existing fusion-tool.ts imports from the new modules via re-exports — no behavioral changes.

All existing tests must pass after each extraction.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] fusion-utils.ts created with mapWithConcurrencyLimit and extractText
- [ ] fusion-utils.test.ts created with unit tests
- [ ] fusion-config.ts created with all 4 config functions
- [ ] fusion-config.test.ts created with unit tests (temp files for load/save)
- [ ] fusion-judge.ts created with parseJudgeAnalysis and type guards
- [ ] fusion-judge.test.ts created with sample LLM output parsing tests
- [ ] fusion-format.ts created with formatFusionResult and formatPanelResults
- [ ] fusion-format.test.ts created with structured data formatting tests
- [ ] fusion-models.ts created with 3 model resolution functions
- [ ] fusion-models.test.ts created with mock ModelRegistry tests
- [ ] All existing tests in the repo still pass
- [ ] No behavioral changes to any public export

## Blocked by

None — can start immediately

## Notes

- Config loading must respect .pi/scope.json (ADR-0001) and fail-closed on malformed config (ADR-0002)
- Type guards in fusion-judge.ts should be exported for reuse by other modules if needed
- fusion-utils.ts must not import from any other new module (it'\''s the leaf dependency)'
```

Report the issue URL returned.
